3277150.name: Shinobi Unleashed
3277150.description:
THE COMBAT

Forget tab-targeting. Forget standing still and watching cooldown bars. In Shinobi Unleashed, you fight like a shinobi.

Weave real hand signs to cast devastating jutsus. Chain fluid combos from blade strikes into elemental techniques. Swing through forests on a rope kunai. Summon meteors from the sky, encase yourself in ethereal Shingoku armor, or hunt down the legendary Jinsoku Blade to master teleportation. With over 70 unique jutsus across multiple elements, your fighting style is yours to create.

THE WORLD

The Land of Shinobi spans over 240 square miles of persistent, hand-crafted terrain — built in Unreal Engine 5 with Nanite technology for a level of detail that has to be seen to be believed. From bustling coastal ports to hidden mountain temples, underground mines to untamed wilderness, this is one of the largest open worlds ever created for an MMORPG.

And it's alive. A dynamic weather system brings sudden rainstorms, dense fog perfect for ambushes, and star-filled nights. The world evolves with dynamic events — S-Rank Rogue Shinobi invasions, territorial battles, and surprises that ensure no two sessions feel the same.

THE HUNT

Track down powerful S-Rank bosses and world bosses for legendary jutsu scrolls and rare gear. Your progression is limitless — build your shinobi over weeks and months, unlocking devastating new abilities and equipment. Sell your spoils to city vendors, trade directly with other players, or corner the market on rare drops. The economy is player-driven and the rewards are real.

THE VILLAGE

This is a true, always-online MMORPG running on Microsoft Azure dedicated servers — not peer-to-peer, not host-based. Your character persists. Your progress saves. Found a clan, appoint officers, and rise through official leaderboards. Connect with a global community through integrated clan, party, and global chat. Choose your home region and build your legacy.

Key Features

  • 70+ Unique Jutsus — Fire, lightning, earth, wind, water, and forbidden techniques

  • 240+ Square Mile Open World — One of the largest MMORPG maps ever created

  • Unreal Engine 5 — Nanite + Lumen for next-gen visuals with anime-inspired art

  • Dedicated Azure Servers — True MMO infrastructure, not peer-to-peer

  • Flow of Battle Combat — Hand signs, dynamic combos, rope kunai traversal

  • Clans & Social Systems — Custom ranks, parties, integrated chat, leaderboards

  • Player-Driven Economy — Trade, sell, and dominate the marketplace

  • Dynamic Weather & Events — Rain, fog, storms, day/night cycle, S-Rank invasions

  • Free to Play — Jump in with no barrier to entry

英语*
